narrative_text: Suddenly, the chest clicks open! Inside, Pip finds a swirling pearl that glows with a mysterious light, but a curious, striped sea-snake has darted out from behind the coral to see what all the fuss is about.
branch_summary: Pip opens the chest and meets a curious, striped sea-snake!
scene_description: An underwater scene in the Blue Lagoon at midday, where shafts of golden sunlight pierce through the turquoise water. The sandy floor is disturbed around the open chest, sending up tiny glittering particles. The mood is one of discovery and sudden surprise, with a high-contrast palette of neon pinks, deep teals, and bright yellow-and-black stripes.

properties.color: iridescent teal scales with a soft lemon-yellow underbelly
properties.size: medium, about the size of a large dog
properties.texture: smooth, glossy scales like polished glass
properties.pattern: glowing sapphire spots trailing along the spine
properties.distinctive_features: long translucent fins that look like silk fans and two small curved horns on the head

entities.pose: recoiling slightly, body arched in a tight curve, all fins flared out wide and mouth open

properties.color: weathered oak brown with tarnished gold trim
properties.texture: rough wood grain with metallic cold edges
properties.pattern: engraved swirling wave patterns on the lid
properties.distinctive_features: the lid is now wide open, revealing a velvet-lined interior filled with gold coins

entities.pose: sitting flat on the sand with the heavy lid resting fully open against the seafloor

properties.color: shimmering opalescent white with a violet core
properties.size: small, the size of a grapefruit
properties.pattern: swirling internal clouds of silver mist
properties.distinctive_features: hovering slightly above its surroundings with a faint white aura

entities.pose: floating statically in mid-air just above the chest's velvet lining

properties.color: bold sunny yellow and jet black
properties.pattern: thick alternating vertical stripes like a bumblebee
properties.distinctive_features: a flat, paddle-shaped tail and a tiny flicking tongue

entities.pose: coiled in a vertical spiral, head poking forward with one eye visible

properties.color: vibrant neon pink with deep purple grooves
properties.texture: bumpy and porous like a sponge
properties.pattern: intricate labyrinthine ridges across the surface
properties.distinctive_features: tiny silver bubbles occasionally escaping from its crevices

entities.pose: anchored firmly to the seabed, wide and dome-shaped

error_exclusions.reason: Snake is floating in water; weight is not a prominent visual cue.
There is only one magical pearl.
